overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit urban streets, covered underpasses, and futuristic commercial districts, eventually colliding with another car near a medical center before continuing through another covered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with digital billboards

events.description: vehicle turns right entering covered underpass area

agents.ego_description: driving black sports car through urban street approaching an intersection and turning right

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: illuminated sign for 'Trash Run' business with purple neon text
large vertical digital advertisement screen displaying product imagery
massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street at night with the black sports car driving forward. A 'Trash Run' sign is visible on the right while large digital billboards line the left side of the street. The vehicle approaches and begins turning right toward an elevated highway structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban corridor with linear neon ceiling lights

events.description: fully enters covered corridor with green painted lanes and overhead lighting
approaching exit of covered area, natural night sky becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising through covered highway corridor following a silver sedan ahead

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane through the corridor

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered highway with embedded linear lights
long fluorescent light strips running along the corridor ceiling
road surface painted with distinctive green lanes and markings

segments.scene_description: The car drives through a long covered corridor beneath the elevated highway. The environment is artificially lit with linear neon lights overhead and distinctive green painted road lanes. The vehicle follows a silver sedan through this sheltered urban passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and commercial towers

events.description: exits covered corridor into open plaza area with palm trees visible
vehicle navigates a left turn around a curved road section

agents.ego_description: navigating through open city streets lined with palm trees and modern architecture

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
ground floor commercial spaces with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the scene opens into a spacious urban plaza lined with palm trees and modern glass towers. The car makes a left turn through this open area, passing street-level shops with bright neon signage while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

events.description: black sports car collides with green sedan near medical center entrance
vehicle recovers from collision and continues driving forward

agents.ego_description: approaching medical center and colliding with a green sedan before continuing

notable_agents.action: green sedan turning across the path, resulting in collision

entered.detail: large building with red medical cross symbol and 'Med' signage
curved road junction with traffic barriers and directional markings

segments.scene_description: The car approaches a medical center building marked with a red cross symbol. At approximately 50 seconds, the vehicle collides with a green sedan near the entrance. After the impact, the car continues driving toward another covered underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel with red warning symbols on walls

events.description: enters second covered tunnel area with distinctive red X symbols on walls

agents.ego_description: driving through covered tunnel section following the road curve

notable_agents.action: large truck parked or moving slowly on the left side of the tunnel

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the underpass with embedded lighting fixtures
large red X warning symbols painted on the tunnel walls
smooth concrete walls lining both sides of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the car entering another covered tunnel characterized by large red X symbols on the walls. The vehicle drives through this artificially lit corridor with green painted road surfaces, passing a large truck on the left side as it continues toward the tunnel exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a black sports car as it navigates a neon-drenched urban landscape, transitioning from open city streets through several sheltered corridors. It begins on a wet, billboard-lined street, passing a Trash Run sign before turning right to enter a long covered corridor defined by linear overhead lights and green road lanes. As the vehicle exits this sheltered passage, the scene opens into a spacious plaza filled with palm trees, glass towers, and bright storefronts. The camera then follows the car as it makes a left turn toward a medical center, where it collides with a green sedan before pushing forward toward another underpass. Finally, the environment shifts back into an artificially lit tunnel marked by large red X symbols on the walls, passing a large truck as the car drives toward the exit.
